item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 3min Michael Carrick: “It’s shocking to send off Licha. Shocking”.
“One of the WORST
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 3min Michael Carrick: “It’s shocking to send off Licha. Shocking”.
“One of the WORST decisions I have EVER seen”. 225 166 1 mil 32 mil

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 4min Michael Carrick: “You can see that is two games in a row we've had those decisio
item.description: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 4min Michael Carrick: “You can see that is two games in a row we've had those decisions go against us”. 229 166 1 mil 40 mil
